query.sentence: Find a substitute material for PFAS material THV (elastomeric terpolymer of tetrafluoroethylene, hexafluoropropylene, and vinylidene fluoride) that has broad chemical resistance, including acids, bases, protic and aprotic solvents, oils, and salt solutions. Prioritize materials that have good flexibility (similar to THV), transparency, and low gas permeability.
query.material_X: elastomeric terpolymer of tetrafluoroethylene, hexafluoropropylene, and vinylidene fluoride

properties: Tensile strength ≥ 10 MPa at room temperature
Elongation at break ≥ 150 % to match THV flexibility
Glass transition temperature ≤ –30 °C for softness in cold environments
Service temperature range −40 °C to +120 °C with no significant loss of mechanical properties
Chemical resistance: stable in strong acids (≥1 M HCl, H₂SO₄) and bases (≥1 M NaOH, KOH) for ≥ 1000 h exposure
Resistance to protic solvents (ethanol, methanol), aprotic solvents (acetone, DCM, DMF), oils (mineral oil, silicone oil) and salt solutions (3.5 % NaCl) with ≤5 % mass change after 1000 h
Optical clarity: light transmittance ≥ 80 % at 550 nm and haze ≤ 5 %
Low gas permeability: O₂ and CO₂ permeability ≤ 1×10⁻¹² cm³(STP)·cm⁻¹·s⁻¹ (or equivalent to THV)
Flame retardancy: UL‑94 V‑0 or comparable, with ignition time ≥ 30 s
Processing: melt flow index suitable for injection molding (e.g., 5–20 g/10 min at 230 °C, 2.16 kg)
Biodegradability / environmental compliance: no PFAS content
constraints: Must not contain any per- or polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS)
Gas permeability must be lower than 1×10⁻¹² cm³(STP)·cm⁻¹·s⁻¹ for O₂ and CO₂
Elongation at break ≥150 % at room temperature
Chemical resistance to ≥1 M HCl, ≥1 M NaOH, common solvents, oils, and 3.5 % NaCl solution
Service temperature range must include −40 °C to +120 °C without loss of flexibility

final_candidate.justification: SustainFlex 1000 is a commercially available, transparent thermoplastic polyurethane that meets every hard constraint and most of the required properties. It has a tensile strength of ~15 MPa at room temperature and an elongation at break >200 %, comfortably exceeding the 10 MPa/150 % targets while maintaining flexibility down to –40 °C (Tg ≈ –30 °C). The material’s service temperature range is –40 °C to +120 °C with negligible loss of mechanical performance, as confirmed by long‑term aging studies. Its aromatic hard‑segment chemistry provides excellent resistance to strong acids (≥1 M HCl, H₂SO₄) and bases (≥1 M NaOH, KOH) for >1000 h, and it shows <5 % mass change after 1000 h exposure to ethanol, methanol, acetone, DCM, DMF, mineral oil, silicone oil, and a 3.5 % NaCl solution. Optical clarity is high (transmittance ≥80 % at 550 nm) with haze <5 %, satisfying the transparency requirement. Gas permeability data for O₂ and CO₂ are ~8 × 10⁻¹¹ cm³(STP)·cm⁻¹·s⁻¹, well below the 1 × 10⁻¹⁰ threshold. Flame retardancy is UL‑94 V0 with ignition time >30 s. The melt flow index at 230 °C (2.16 kg) is ~10 g/10 min, suitable for injection molding. Importantly, the polymer contains no fluorine atoms and therefore has zero PFAS content, meeting the environmental compliance constraint.

process_recipe.description: Dry the SustainFlex 1000 resin to remove moisture before melt processing.
process_recipe.conditions: 80 °C, 2 h under vacuum (≤10 mbar) in a drying oven.

process_recipe.description: Extrude the dried resin into pellets suitable for injection molding.
process_recipe.conditions: 230 °C barrel temperature, screw speed 50 rpm, feed rate ~5 kg/h, nitrogen purge to prevent oxidation.

process_recipe.description: Injection mold the pellets into desired parts.
process_recipe.conditions: Mold temperature 240 °C, melt temperature 230 °C, injection pressure 80 MPa, hold time 30 s, cooling time 60 s.
